hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

header.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/70 border-b border-[#2A4736]/10 backdrop-saturate-150 shadow-sm

cards.default_classes: bg-white border border-[#2A4736]/10 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out

components.navigation: Fixed header with crystal glass effect, logo on left, primary links center, CTA on right (Login/Signup).
components.hero_section: Asymmetrical layout. Large H1, dynamic editorial ribbon marquee below for categories (Photography, Catering, Decor).
components.vendor_card: Image focused (aspect-square or 4:3), sharp typography, minimal details overlay. No generic Shadcn cards; use custom divs with hover effects.
components.search_bar: Prominent, pill-shaped (rounded-full) input floating on hero, elevated with soft shadow and heavy padding (py-4 px-6).
components.dashboard_layout: Strict grid hierarchy. Left sidebar for nav (Dashboard, Profile, Settings). Content area bento grid for stats (Vendors: views, leads / Customers: saved vendors, upcoming events).
components.forms: Customized Shadcn forms. Inputs with rounded-xl, light background (#F3EFE9), 1px focus ring using secondary color (#2A4736).
components.buttons: Primary buttons: solid background, rounded-full, distinct hover transition. Secondary buttons: transparent with 1px solid border.

animation_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must change color/background on hover with duration-300 ease-out.
animation_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis smooth scroll is recommended for premium feel.

hero_background.description: People raising wine glasses in selective focus - use for main marketplace hero background.

category_decoration.description: Floral arrangement - use for Decoration category or vendor example.

category_catering.description: Catering setup with food displayed - use for Catering category or vendor example.

category_photography.description: Photographer outdoor - use for Photography category or vendor example.

testing.requirements: All interactive elements must include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g. data-testid='vendor-search-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use generic tailwind colors like blue-500 or gray-200. Use the hex codes provided via custom classes or tailwind config.
Apply generative spacing. Containers should feel roomy.
For the hero section, use the provided hero_background image with the exact gradient overlay specified.
Ensure all fonts are imported properly (Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi via Google Fonts or Fontshare).
Build the dashboard using a clear sidebar and grid content area with minimal card borders.
Use standard semantic HTML wrapped with Tailwind, using Shadcn for complex inputs (Select, Forms, Dialogs).
